pageDescription: Calculate fielding percentage for baseball players

definition.title: Fielding Percentage
definition.description: A statistic measuring a player's ability to handle chances without making errors

interpretation.title: Performance Interpretation
interpretation.description: Fielding percentage ranges from 0.000 to 1.000, with 1.000 being perfect fielding

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides fielding percentage calculations only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Complete defensive evaluation should consider additional metrics like range and double plays

importantNotesList: Fielding percentage is just one measure of defensive performance
Does not account for range, double plays, or difficult plays made
A high fielding percentage indicates fewer errors relative to chances
Sample size matters - more chances provide a better evaluation

messages.enterInformation: Enter putouts, assists, and errors to calculate fielding percentage
messages.resultMessage: Your fielding percentage calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides fielding percentage calculations based on standard baseball statistics formulas. Complete defensive evaluation should consider additional metrics, context, and sample size factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Baseball Resources
seekHelp.content: For comprehensive baseball defensive analysis and player evaluation, consult baseball reference sites, sports analytics resources, or professional scouts and analysts.

errors.putouts: Please enter a valid number of putouts
errors.assists: Please enter a valid number of assists
errors.errors: Please enter a valid number of errors

tooltips.putouts: Number of outs recorded by the player directly (e.g., catching fly balls, tagging runners)
tooltips.assists: Number of times the player helped record an out (e.g., throwing to first base)
tooltips.errors: Number of defensive mistakes that allow runners to advance or reach base

enter_fielding_statistics_to_calculate_f: Enter fielding statistics to calculate Fielding Percentage (FPCT)
plays_that_helped_record_an_out_5: Plays that helped record an out
misplays_that_should_have_been_made_7: Misplays that should have been made
fielding_percentage_fpct_measures_how_of:
Fielding Percentage (FPCT) measures how often a fielder successfully handles a chance without
                        making an error. It's calculated by dividing successful plays (putouts + assists) by total
                        chances.
high_fpct_doesnt_reflect_a_fielders_rang:
High FPCT doesn't reflect a fielder's range or the difficulty of plays
                          attempted.
